project_scope.primary_objective: Build a headless AI assistant server and secure SSH gateway to home NAS
project_scope.secondary_objective: Repurpose secondary server hardware for infrastructure and utility VMs

primary_ai_server.processors: 2 x AMD Opteron 6274 (16 cores total, natively supports AVX)

deployment_phases.software_stack: llama.cpp compiled from source (optimized for native AVX registers)
deployment_phases.model_target: Large-parameter models in GGUF format (e.g., 70B parameters or Mixture-of-Experts)

deployment_phases.requirement: Sourcing a proprietary HP 10-pin mini-connector to dual 8-pin GPU power cable
deployment_phases.software_stack: Ollama or vLLM with partial layer offloading to 8GB VRAM

secondary_utility_server.processors: 2 x Intel Xeon X5670 (No AVX support)
secondary_utility_server.operating_system: Proxmox VE (Type-1 Hypervisor based on Debian Linux)
use_cases: Deep packet inspection & network monitoring probe (Zeek / Suricata)
Core infrastructure services (Vaultwarden credential vault, Pi-hole DNS)

hp_dl385p_gen8_allocation.topology: Symmetrical NUMA distribution (8 modules / 64GB per CPU socket)
hp_dl385p_gen8_allocation.bus_speed: Native 1333MHz lockstep execution across all active memory channels

dell_r710_allocation.topology: Symmetrical slot mapping (Slots A1, A2 for CPU 1; Slots B1, B2 for CPU 2)

modules: 2 x 4GB DDR3 ECC loose RAM modules
discarded_hardware.disposition: Gift to a friend; excluded from production server environments to maintain architectural symmetry

networking_and_security_topology.remote_access_protocol: Mesh VPN framework (Tailscale or isolated WireGuard tunnel)

access_demarcation.authentication: Strict key-based SSH authentication only; password login disabled

access_demarcation.binding_interface: 0.0.0.0 (Bound to tunnel interface for remote VS Code Continue.dev extension)

networking_and_security_topology.storage_interconnect: Direct internal 10Gbps local networking fabric linking the AI server and home NAS
